use_cases: Website footer for SaaS landing pages with organized link navigation
Multi-column footer for product documentation and help centers
Social media integrated footer for content and media platforms
Professional footer section for fintech and software applications
Animated entrance footer for marketing and promotional websites
ai_summary: A premium glass-morphism footer component featuring four organized link sections (Product, Company, Resources, Social Links) with staggered entrance animations using motion/react. The component showcases a refined dark aesthetic with radial gradient effects, blurred decorative elements, and responsive grid layout that adapts from mobile to desktop with smooth entrance animations and accessibility support via useReducedMotion.
